page: Vultr voc-m-8c-64gb-800s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server featuring an x86_64 AMD EPYC processor with 8 vCPUs and 4 physical cores. It operates at a clock speed of 2.0 GHz with a shared CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. No GPU resources are present on this instance.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in stress-ng single-core CPU testing, placing in the top 10 percent of tested instances. Multi-core CPU performance and PassMark CPU scores fall within the average range. Memory performance is strong, with large-block read and write bandwidths and PassMark memory scores ranking in the top 25 percent. Database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput perform at average levels. Large-model LLM prompt processing represents a bottleneck, registering in the bottom 25 percent for 7B models.

The shared CPU allocation introduces potential resource contention, which is a notable tradeoff for compute-heavy workloads. However, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive tasks that do not require dedicated CPU cores. This configuration is suitable for memory-optimized workloads, database caching, medium-scale web serving, and general-purpose applications requiring a larger memory footprint relative to compute capacity.
description: Vultr voc-m-8c-64gb-800s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server configured with 8 vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, running on an x86_64 AMD EPYC processor at 2.0 GHz. It features a shared CPU allocation across 4 physical cores and includes 800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong memory bandwidth for large blocks, though multi-core CPU and database operations remain in the average tier. The 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-dense workloads, though the shared CPU model presents a tradeoff for sustained compute tasks. This server is suited for memory-intensive applications, database caching, and web serving.
og_description: Vultr voc-m-8c-64gb-800s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server with 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 800 GB NVMe storage, delivering strong memory bandwidth and top-tier single-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Vultr voc-m-8c-64gb-800s-amd features 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 800 GB NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An AMD EPYC instance featuring a high memory-to-vCPU ratio and local NVMe storage for memory-intensive workloads.
